title: Runtime hooks still scan project-local .fabric/knowledge for pending and canonical counts
description: fabric-hint and knowledge-hint-broad compute pending/review/import signals by reading <projectRoot>/.fabric/knowledge and .fabric/agents.meta.json-derived state, so store-only projects can miss real store-backed knowledge or act on stale local leftovers.
fix_direction: Replace hook filesystem scans with store-binding snapshots or a store-aware helper that reads the resolved read/write store set; avoid project-local .fabric/knowledge as a signal source.

context.notes: Discovered by store-only issue discovery DBP-20260609-010018; deduped against ISS-20260608-046/059/060 and retained as unique runtime-hook drift.

title: Doctor still includes legacy local pending/canonical inspectors after store-only cutover
description: doctor.ts still walks .fabric/knowledge and ~/.fabric/knowledge for pending, relevance migration, filesystem-edit fallback, and canonical inspectors. These runtime checks can report or mutate against retired roots instead of mounted stores.
fix_direction: Port remaining knowledge inspectors to mounted store read/write sets or retire them; do not keep dual-root walkers as fallback patch logic in the zero-user store-only architecture.

context.notes: Discovered by store-only issue discovery DBP-20260609-010018; distinct from ISS-20260608-060, which covers stale doctor help/docs rather than runtime local-root walkers.

title: Store migrate command keeps dual-root migration surface alive after store-only cutover
description: The public fabric store migrate command and implementation still scan project-local .fabric/knowledge and old ~/.fabric/knowledge roots, preserving a migration/shim surface despite the zero-user clean-slate policy.
fix_direction: Remove or quarantine fabric store migrate and the dual-root migration implementation; if historical import is needed, keep it behind an explicit dev-only or documented one-shot maintenance path.

context.notes: Discovered by store-only issue discovery DBP-20260609-010018; separate from ISS-20260608-019, which covers migrate transaction reliability.

title: MCP API schemas still describe dual pending and canonical roots
description: The public schema descriptions for fab_extract_knowledge and fab_review still document team pending under .fabric/knowledge and personal pending under ~/.fabric/knowledge, exposing the retired dual-root model through the MCP contract.
fix_direction: Update schema descriptions to resolved write-target/read-set store language and keep any dual-root wording only in explicitly retired migration notes; align schema tests with store-qualified pending_path/path semantics.

context.notes: Discovered by store-only issue discovery DBP-20260609-010018; distinct from user-doc issue ISS-20260608-059 because this is runtime MCP contract metadata.
